# llama.cpp pin — the engine repo does NOT vendor llama.cpp source.
# The Dockerfile (HF Spaces build) clones it fresh at this exact commit so the
# deployed build matches what was tested locally on Apple Silicon.
#
# repo:   https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp
# commit: 57fe1f07c3b6a1de3f4fff19098e2056a85275b7
# tag:    b9620
#
# Local dev keeps a full checkout at vendor/llama.cpp/ (gitignored). To recreate:
#   git clone https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp vendor/llama.cpp
#   git -C vendor/llama.cpp checkout 57fe1f07c3b6a1de3f4fff19098e2056a85275b7
